title: FSSAI 2026 labelling flexibilities for alcoholic beverages: Analysis of amendments and compliance timelines
description: Alcohol consumption in India is on the rise. The Food Safety and Standards Act, 2006 (‘FSS Act”) defines food (which includes alcoholic beverages), thereby bringing alcoholic beverages within Food Safety and Standards Authority of India’s (FSSAI) regulatory ambit. The Food Safety and Standards (Alcoholic Beverages) Regulations, 2018 (“FSS Regulations”) is the principal regulation governing this sector. The recent amendments in FSS Regulations have brought a major change in the alcohol beverage s
